summary.en-US: One-click toggle to always open Google Gemini in temporary chat mode.

description.en-US:
Tired of manually enabling temporary chat every time you open Gemini?

This extension adds a simple toggle to your toolbar. When enabled, it automatically activates temporary chat mode whenever you visit gemini.google.com — so your conversations are never saved to your Gemini Apps Activity.

Click the toolbar icon to toggle on (blue) or off (grey). That's it.
